text: Hey do you know if Lucy still gets freaked out by fireworks or can we do sparklers this year lol
She's better but let's stick to the yard, less boom. Abuela's already planning food for Saturday
Ha ok. Tia Anne coming too?
Yeah she's off, bringing her potato salad. You working the holiday or off?
Off! I'll swing by around 4 to help grill
Perfect, see you then. Grab Lucy a little flag or something, she'll lose it 😂
camp talent show is at 4 today!! im doing my cartwheel routine, can u come??
Wouldn't miss it, mija. Asking Patricia to cover my 3:30 so I can head over.
yayyy!! grandma dorothy's bringing her phone to film it lol
Ha, tell her to hold it sideways this time. I'll grab you a scoop from that place on Fenton after.
MINT CHOC CHIP pls 🍦
Deal. See you at 4.
Mum, Lucy's zoo permission slip is on the fridge - can you sign it before you walk her to Singer tomorrow?
Ya lo firmé esta mañana, mijo. Todo listo.
Perfect, thank you. I've got a 9am with Patricia so I won't make drop-off.
No problem, we're basically out the door already lol
Ha, good. Tell her I'll be home by 6, I'll make her favorite for dinner.
Will do. Grab my prescription from the CVS on Georgia Ave on your way back?
